text: Heads up team — I'm locking Q3 pricing this Friday. Single Pro tier at $19/month. Dropping the Team tier since less than 4% of accounts are on it. Pushback by EOD <#C001|general> if you disagree.
+1 from product. Two questions for <@U001>: education/nonprofit discount? and are we keeping the 20% annual prepay?
1) Edu/nonprofit: keep 50% off as a standalone Pro plan ($9.50/mo) gated by domain verification. 2) Keep annual prepay at 20%. Don't want a second variable on the same launch.
PR opened: <https://github.com/flowdesktech/flowdesk/pull/4821|Update Stripe price ids for Q3 launch> by <@U002>
Locking it. Pro $19/mo, $182/yr. Edu Pro $9.50/mo with domain verify. Team tier discontinued; existing subs grandfathered through Dec 31.
Dropping the new onboarding flow draft here for <!channel>. Figma: <https://figma.com/file/onboarding-v3>. Three-step. Skips the workspace setup. Ship target end of Q2.
